ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the athlete */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kg */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the athlete's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nocs" (
  "noc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NOC */,
  "noc_name" TEXT /* Name of the NOC */,
  "noc_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the NOC (e.g., USA, GBR) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the NOC */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the NOC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("noc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "noc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NOC the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was formed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_noc_id FOREIGN KEY ("noc_id") REFERENCES nocs ("noc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sport */,
  "rules_url" TEXT /* URL to the official rules of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (Individual/Team) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the event takes place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game took place */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game took place (Summer/Winter) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the game took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the games */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the games */,
  "host_noc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NOC hosting the games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_host_noc_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_noc_id") REFERENCES nocs ("noc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event participated in */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game participated in */,
  "medal" TEXT /* Medal won (Gold/Silver/Bronze/None) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Detailed result of the participation */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_teams" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the athlete in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_sports" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the athlete participates in */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the athlete started participating in the sport */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the athlete stopped participating in the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id", "sport_id")
)
